feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to view custom apps created in s/4hana cloud at work zone.
entry.content:
Hi. I need your help.

I have subscried and set up the work zone(standard, free version) on BTP to use mobile start.

And I have integrated s/4hana cloud and work zone.

In the same space as s/4hana cloud launchpad, I can see the original apps, but I can't see the all custom apps(created with custom bo, custom query, etc.)

How can I see the custom apps?

entry.title: SAP Build Workzone Std ed Free limit reached with just one admin
entry.content:
Hi,

I just created a SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Free tier under our PAYG global account. My surprise is that just after assigning launchpad_administrator role to my user, I got the free tier limit message immediately. 

Any idea what I did wrong? I have a trial global account assigned to the same SAP UID with another Build workzone. Just one admin is assigned there, though.

Thx for your help,

David R.

entry.title: CAP after deploy app not showing in Build Work Zone
entry.content: After deploying my App, it wont show up in Build Work Zone's Content Explorer but no Error or logs anywhere

entry.title: Taskcenter does not receive S4 task notifications
entry.content:
Hello team !

We are having the following issue, we have integrated S/4HANA with SAP Task Center + Mobile Start, everything work as expected but, in the Task Center the Notifications of new tasks are not being displayed in the bell in the page header.

User notifications for taskcenter tasks are not being displayed. When a Purchase Order Approval workflow task is sent to users, the notification is not presented in the workzone. 

The notification is working normally through Fiori's Myinbox.

Only in the workzone that is not working properly. 

The following configurations were made as described in the manual below:

Receiving SAP S/4HANA Workflow Notifications
https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/Setting-Up-SAP-Build-Work-Zone-standard-edition-and-SAP-Mobile-Start-with-SAP-S-4HANA/explaining-the-setup-for-sap-s-4hana

Enabling Notifications From SAP S/4HANA
https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/enabling-notifications-from-sap-s-4hana?locale=en-US

Enable Notifications for End Users
https://help.sap.com/docs/task-center/sap-task-center/enable-notifications-for-end-users

When performing a test of sending a notification through the transaction /n/IWNGW/BEP_DEMO it is displayed in the Fiori myinbox correctly, but it is not displayed in the workzone. 

When accessing the /N/IWFND/ERROR_LOG log, the following message is presented: "The remote service triggered a client error '400': 'Bad Request'"

Any tip is valid, thank you !!!

entry.title: Mobile Start - How to Display PO Information on the Task Card
entry.content:
Hello Team !

I would like to know what procedure to be carried out so that the purchase order release tasks present the information of the items and total value of the order.

To represent my question, please see the attached file, which presents the current mobile start screen and a screen that I took from the mobile start documentation.

any tip is valid, thank you !!

entry.title: Wokzone
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have Created workzone site and exposed On-Prem apps and the tile are appearing in the workzone site but when we try to access the application we are getting the error as "s4** server IP address could not be found" and When I try to access the site inside VDI am facing the issue as SAML2 error.

Thanks in Advance

@Juliuspereira  @Khalid_Desai  @WouterLemaire 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/build-work-zone-server-ip-address-could-not-found/qaq-p/13895298/comment-id/4888955#M4888955

your previous post is very helpful,

kindly guide me with the issue.

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP

entry.title: Content provider in SAP BWZ standard errors out with connectivity error for design time destination
entry.content:
I am following this tutorial Integrate Your Application with SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition.

In step 3 for Common Data Model approach, I have created mta.yaml file as instructed and the cdm.json file as well. After deployment of the CAPM app to cloud foundry in my trial subaccount, destinations got created however the content provider in SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition is not working. When updating the content provider, it errors out as shown below. 

Not sure what went wrong here.

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: CSRF validation fails (403 Forbidden) from SAP Build Work Zone approuter
entry.content:
Hello Community,

The app contains a FileUploader element. The related backend oData service has CSRF protection enabled. To enable file upload, there is a controller extension for the FileUploader where the CSRF token is fetched and explicitly added (x-csrf-token) to the POST request header. It works correctly from SAP BAS with "Preview application".

The app is now deployed to Cloud Foundry, where it is added to a SAP Build Work Zone standard edition page. The upolad from the Build Work Zone site throws the error 403, and this is found in the approuter error log:

POST request to /sap/opu/odata/sap/Z<....> completed with status 403 The request contains an invalid x-csrf-token 

I can se in the browser debugger that the request does contain the x-csrf-token parameter with a plausible value. That part looks identical as when testing from SAP BAS where the token is accepted.

I have found note 3495019 "403 error when the AppRouter generates a CSRF Token" which seems relevant. Except I am pretty sure the CSRF protection is already disabled in the xs-app.json. Here it is:

{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/sap/(.*)$",
      "target": "/sap/$1",
      "destination": "<name of my Cloud Connector destination>",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^/resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^/test-resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/test-resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    }
  ]
}

I did find number of similar questions, most notably:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/x-csrf-token-validation-success-from-standalone-app-but-fails-from-managed/qaq-p/12535042#M4699094

but no solved ones, or possibly I do not understand the recommendations and need more guidance.

Please advise what to do - thank you in advance!

entry.title: Error Importing content in SAP Build Work Zone - SAP Mobile Start with SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I’m setting up SAP Mobile Start with SAP S/4HANA Cloud in SAP Build Work Zone.
Tutorial: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/Setting-Up-SAP-Build-Work-Zone-standard-edition-and-SAP-Mobile-Start-with-SAP-S-4HANA

The problem is that when I import content into SAP Build Work Zone, it doesn’t bring any components.

When I check in SAP S/4HANA Cloud using the “Display Launchpad Content Exposure Logs” app, I see the scenario is called correctly.

Here is how I have the content provider configured:

This is how I have the destinations set up in BTP:
Design-time destination

Runtime tiles

Runtime apps

This is the SAP S/4HANA Cloud role exposed in BTP.

Does anyone have an idea where the error might be or what configuration point I should check?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Does anyone know why after deploying the app to workzone, the view looks different?
entry.content:
Hey guys, 
Can anyone tell me why when testing the application directly from BAS I have a more centralized view with spaces on the left and right as shown in the purple arrow below?

When deploying the same app in the Work Zone, the screen view changes, losing these side spaces.

Does anyone know how to solve this and leave these side spaces?

entry.title: SAP Build Work zone, Standard edition Access Denied
entry.content:
Hi All,

In my BTP Trail account -> My subscriptions -> SAP Build Work zone, Standard edition clicked on "Go to application". Then I am getting the below screen.

Please help me to resolve this issue.

entry.title: HTML5 App published but not showing in Work Zone Content Manager
entry.content:
Hi,

I followed the following tutorial on the trial account to publish my Incident Management App created using Business Application Studio, while testing the CAP development, as made from the previous tutorials of this one:

Deploy to CF 

Everything went as expected, my cf apps command in then BAS  Terminal returning the 2 apps, as in the screenshot of the tutorial, and my cf services  command returns 4 services, because HANA Cloud has been moved from space to subaccount section.

 

However, I still do not see my app within the Content Manager of Work Zone, as mentioned in the following tutorial:

Integrate with Work Zone 

 

What could be the reason?

 

Following are the screenshots of my Role Collections, Subaccount Instances, CF Space and Work Zone Content Manager.

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Form not shown in MyInbox Workzone standard
entry.content: In my workzone standard portal the My Inbox does show the tasks. But when I click on the task the form is not shown to approve or descline a task (see first screenshot). The inbox is working directly in the SAP BTP cockpit (second screenshot) so it seems a kind of authorization problem.

entry.title: Workzone Header toolbar functions not working
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am encountering an issue in our system (DEV, QAS, PRD) where certain key functions, including User Profile, Notification, Search, and Navigate Back, are not working when pressed. These buttons, highlighted in the attached screenshot. Not thing happended and not issue from console log in browser development tool.

Could you please provide guidance on troubleshooting and resolving this issue?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Henry Nguyen

entry.title: Issue while accessing the Ariba application in BTP workzone
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have exposed the Ariba application from on-Prem to BTP workzone, While trying to access the Ariba application inside the BTP work zone we are getting the below error, but while accessing the url outside the BTP workzone it is working correctly. Please let me know if further details needed.

Any suggestions will be helpful to deal with this issue in BTP workzone.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: SAP Build work zone, SAPUI5 app, controller not executing
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I need your expert advice for an issue that I am facing when I deployed a simple UI5 application to cloud foundry.

I have created a simple UI5 which has a button and a label element, on press of which a function is called which displays a MessageBox. 

In view controller, I have added a MessageBox in init, just to verify is init is being called.

When I run the app with no-flp and sandbox, it runs perfectly fine.

When I deployed the app to cf , it is working fine when I open the app from HTML5 applications(I added FLP config while creating project).

Now when i ran the same app on Build Work Zone, the View controller is not loaded. The message box in init as well as button event is not displayed.  I observed that when I inspect the app, the controllers are not loaded in sources tab.

I need your advice for this issue.

entry.title: Workzone Transport tool for Workzone BTP Objects has disappeared
entry.content:
Hello all,

In SAP BTP to transport objects like applications, spaces, roles, etc we used the Transport Management tool that was available in Work Zone.

Since few days ago this option has disappeared. Has anyone encountered the same issue?

 

this is gone now

entry.title: SAP Work Zone: Fiori app not visible in Content Manager Group
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm doing a small PoC on a trial account and I have come across an issue while trying to deploy a Fiori App via BAS to BTP and then expose it to a Work Zone Site.

I have successfully done the following:

1. Create a simple Hello World Fiori app and deployed it to Cloud Foundry

2. Ran the app via the HTML5 Applications tab on BTP Cockpit

3. Assigned the app to the 'Everyone' role in the Content Manager of Work Zone.

4. Created a Group via Content Manager.

PROBLEM: When I try to edit the Group and add the App to it, the App is not visible.

See attached screenshots.

Can someone please shed some light on what could be causing the issue?

entry.title: How to Handle Mass Role "assign site" in workzone
entry.content:
I’m currently provisioning PFCG roles from ERP to BTP IAS and automating role federation through Work Zone content packages.

However, the issue lies in Work Zone itself—it’s not enough to simply provision roles. Each role must be manually assigned to a site using the "ASSIGN SITE" button.

Given that there are over 1,000 roles, manually assigning them via the UI is incredibly challenging, especially since there’s no search functionality for unassigned roles!

Is there any way to automate role assignments, or at least make this process easier? Any suggestions or solutions would be greatly appreciated!

 

Best Regards

entry.title: SAP Fiori My Inbox URL generation for intent-based object navigation
entry.content:
Dear expert, 

I'm working on migrating UWL task list to Fiori My Inbox and referring KBA 2274940 - URL generation for intent-based navigation

I'm launching via SAP Work Zone Fiori Inbox Cloud - default webgui / wda

I'm able to configure Open Task via SWFVISU transaction which open the task in a new tab. However, the link in the Related Object tab fails to open the page. 

Configuration has been setup in SWFVISU for Object Visualization. The link generated upon clicked generated as below. The query parameter P_INSTID is generated with encoded value. I tried remove the encoded value manually and the page was able to load correctly. 

https://workzone.host#QMSMObject-process?P_INSTID=%EF%BB%BF0002000021110001%EF%BB%BF&P_CATID=BO&P_TYPEID=QMSM&P_METHOD=DISPLAY

From the web developer tools network response, the parameter is encoded with "Control character zero width no-break space". 

Debug from backend, the field actually returned correct value without any space. 

 

Any idea is there any configuration that I could missed out?

Regards,

Ben

#MyInbox #Fiori #URLGeneration #ObjectVisualization
